name: War Trance
description: An intense bloodlust flows through the veins of the recipient of this spell, making it a more fierce attacker.

name: Reckless Oath
description: When a friendly creature is enchanted with this spell it becomes extremely eager for battle, sacrificing loyalty for the lust of battle.

name: Radiant Burst
description: Extremely bright lights appear and dance around the target of this spell, distracting it from battle and reducing its ability to defend itself.

name: Dark Command
description: The caster draws upon the power of the demons to bolster the loyalty of one of his minions.

name: Unravel
description: Removes all enchantments from the target creature. Does not affect any special abilities.

name: Blinding Dust
description: Swirling winds surround the target of this spell kicking up dust and other debris. The target becomes distracted and unable to fully defend itself.

name: Aegis
description: The caster of this spell is able to conjure a shield of energy around a single friendly creature, reducing the effectiveness of missile and territory fire against it.

name: Guiding Star
description: This spell sharpens the vision of one friendly creature with ranged combat ability, enabling it to pinpoint its ranged attack.

name: Mend
description: An important supplementary spell, healing restores two loyalty to a friendly unit. Loyalty will be added up to the target's maximum.

name: Inferno
description: The most destructive spell in the lands, hellblast surrounds a targeted enemy army with a searing hot firestorm causing some major damage.

name: Valiant Heart
description: The target of this spell becomes inspired by visions of mighty warriors cutting down their enemies. This greatly enhances the combat ability of the enchanted.

name: Storm Lance
description: The caster of this spell summons the power of the skies to strike an enemy creature with a lightning bolt. Shocking!

name: Arcane Mantle
description: The magic of this enchantment consumes its target, making it feel more confident in its abilities. As a result, the creature touched by this gains in defense.

name: Great Unraveling
description: Removes all enchantments from every creature in the selected territory. Does not affect any special abilities.

name: Dread Wave
description: The summoner directs the face of fear at an enemy army group, sending them into panic and reducing their loyalty.

name: Wellspring
description: The waters of a great mystical fountain are sprinkled upon the recipient of this spell giving it a random bonus. The target receives +Melee or +Loyalty or +Ranged.

name: Wellspring of Might
description: The waters of a great mystical fountain are sprinkled upon the recipient of this spell giving it a random bonus. The target receives +Melee or +Loyalty or +Ranged.

name: Wellspring of Reach
description: The waters of a great mystical fountain are sprinkled upon the recipient of this spell giving it a random bonus. The target receives +Melee or +Loyalty or +Ranged.

name: Wellspring of Vigor
description: The waters of a great mystical fountain are sprinkled upon the recipient of this spell giving it a random bonus. The target receives +Melee or +Loyalty or +Ranged.

name: Binding Sigil
description: Another mind altering spell, paralyzing fear ceases the movement of one enemy creature for one turn as it becomes wracked with terror.

name: Withering Mark
description: With this spell the summoner is able to harness the power of the skull realm to drain the will of one enemy creature, reducing its combat characteristics.

name: Veil of Smoke
description: A cloud of billowing smoke surrounds one enemy creature limiting its visibility. This will reduce or negate the target's ability to make a ranged attack.

name: Waystep
description: An excellent utility spell, teleport allows the caster to call upon the gates of travel to shift any one of his or her minions to any friendly territory.

name: Essence Haze
description: A mana-dampening fog covers every wizard, preventing normal spell casting and creature summoning for three turns.

name: Shatter Rune
description: Forces the targeted wizard to discard a random rune on their next turn.

name: Rune Sight
description: Reveals the targeted opponent's concealed runes to the caster for five turns.

name: Hush
description: Prevents the targeted wizard from calling Chao, Pung, Kong or Game and from casting spells or summoning creatures for three turns. Telepaths are immune.
